data.topic: The first moment of freedom after a long office day
data.sfw_prompt: Karen, igbaddie, 1girl, a 25-year-old Asian lady with long brown natural wavy hair, brown eyes, flawless skin no tattoo, skinny body shape with long legs, captured in a grainy smartphone photo. She is sitting on the floor of her condo entrance, kicking off her black high heels. She wears a tight white silk button-down shirt halfway unbuttoned and a micro mini grey office skirt. The environment is messy with a laptop bag and a discarded blazer on a nearby chair. Lighting is a harsh direct flash from an iPhone, creating high contrast and a candid 'just got home' vibe.
data.caption_draft: Finally home... office hours are over, but the night is just beginning. Who wants to help me relax? 🥂✨

prompt_structure.vibe: A realistic condo hallway with scattered shoes and soft ambient evening light filtered through the door.
poses: Sitting on the floor, one leg extended, leaning back on her palms with a tired gaze.
Kneeling on one knee, head tilted back, eyes closed in relief.
Slouching against the doorframe, biting her lip while looking at the camera.
Bent over slightly to reach her shoes, showcasing the curve of her waist and hips.
prompt_structure.outfit: Unbuttoned white silk shirt, grey pencil skirt, sheer black stockings slightly snagged.
prompt_structure.lighting: Sharp direct flash, digital noise, realistic smartphone night mode grain.
prompt_structure.mood_and_tone: Tired but alluring, a mix of professional fatigue and home liberation.
camera_settings: Low-angle shot from the floor looking up at her face, 24mm wide lens.
Close-up on her hands unbuckling the heel strap, shallow depth of field.
Medium shot from a side angle, showing her arched back as she leans against the wall.
High-angle 'downward' shot focusing on her long legs and discarded shoes.

data.topic: Mirror selfie checking the 'end of day' look
data.sfw_prompt: Karen, igbaddie, 1girl, a 25-year-old Asian lady with long brown natural wavy hair, brown eyes, flawless skin no tattoo, skinny body shape with long legs, holding a Black Titanium iPhone 16 Pro Max for a mirror selfie. She is in a dimly lit bathroom with steam on the mirror edges. She has removed her skirt and is wearing only the oversized white office shirt and lace panties. Her hair is slightly messy. The lighting is a warm glow from the vanity mirror mixed with the phone's flash glare.
data.caption_draft: Work Karen is gone. Home Karen is... bored. 🖤

prompt_structure.vibe: Bathroom with marble tiles, skincare bottles visible, lived-in and realistic.
poses: Standing with one hip cocked, phone held high, head tilted to the side.
Leaning against the sink, one hand playing with a strand of hair.
Back to the mirror, looking over her shoulder at her own reflection.
Sitting on the vanity counter, legs crossed, phone obscuring half her face.
prompt_structure.outfit: Oversized white silk shirt, black lace-trimmed lingerie, messy 'after-work' hair.
prompt_structure.lighting: Warm overhead vanity light, mirror reflections, smartphone flash bounce.
prompt_structure.mood_and_tone: Mysterious, seductive, and slightly lonely in the big mirror.
camera_settings: Direct mirror reflection, iPhone 16 Pro Max visible in hand, eye-level.
Side-angle mirror shot focusing on her silhouette and long legs.
Close-up on the phone screen reflecting her teasing wink.
Lowered camera angle looking up into the mirror for a dramatic leg-lengthening effect.

data.topic: Unwinding with a glass of wine
data.sfw_prompt: Karen, igbaddie, 1girl, a 25-year-old Asian lady with long brown natural wavy hair, brown eyes, flawless skin no tattoo, skinny body shape with long legs, lounging on a velvet emerald sofa. She has changed into a silk slip dress in champagne color. She holds a half-full wine glass. The room is dark except for a single floor lamp, creating soft shadows. The photo is a raw, high-ISO smartphone shot with natural grain and motion blur in her hand movement.
data.caption_draft: Is it still 'drinking alone' if I'm talking to all of you? 🍷 Slide for my mood tonight.

prompt_structure.vibe: Modern minimalist living room, city lights visible through the window behind her.
poses: Lying flat on her back, legs draped over the armrest, holding wine glass up.
Curled into a ball in the corner of the sofa, chin on knees, looking sad/sexy.
Leaning forward toward the camera, cleavage subtly showing, holding the glass to her lips.
Stretching her arms up, silk dress riding up slightly, eyes half-closed.
prompt_structure.outfit: Champagne silk slip dress with thin spaghetti straps, bare feet.
prompt_structure.lighting: Moody low-light, warm yellow lamp glow, soft bokeh from city lights.
prompt_structure.mood_and_tone: Elegant, wealthy, but emotionally distant and single.

Tight close-up on her face through the wine glass, distorted reflection.
